column1: # STING MEP Symbols Index — general-purpose MEP plan / section / SLD annotation symbols.
# Used by MepSymbolEngine (Core/Symbols/MepSymbolEngine.cs) alongside the ISO 6412 spool
# catalogue (Data/Fabrication/STING_ISO_SYMBOLS_INDEX.csv). Each row maps a short
# symbol_code to the .rfa family produced by SymbolLibraryCreator from the matching JSON
#   symbol_code    — short identifier matching SymbolDefinition.Id in JSON
#   category        — discipline bucket (Mechanical / Electrical / Plumbing / FireProtection / Lighting)
#   standard        — authoring standard (CIBSE | IEC60617 | IEEE315 | BS7671 | ISO14617 | BS6465)
#   view_types      — comma-separated: Plan | Section | SLD | Fabrication | All
#   color_scheme    — preferred scheme: Corporate | BS1710 | CIBSE | IEC60617 | ASHRAE | NBS
#   paper_size_mm   — target paper-space symbol size at any view scale
# they are loaded from Data/Fabrication/STING_ISO_SYMBOLS_INDEX.csv by the same engine.
# This file covers plan-annotation and schematic symbols only.
# ── SLD symbols — IEEE 315 / ANSI Y32 (US projects) ──────────────────────────
